---
title: "Program"
toc: true
---

An interdisciplinary meeting on the biology and medicine of the peritoneal cavity. Sessions are built around shared mechanisms rather than single diseases. The programme is designed to be welcoming for those travelling alone — informal trips, fireside chats and shared meals make it easy to connect.

::: {.callout-note}
This is the provisional programme. Times, sessions and speakers may still change as confirmations come in.
:::

## Day 1 — 8 September 2027

::: {.schedule}
<div class="slot"><div class="time">10:00–10:30</div><div class="event">Arrivals &amp; coffee</div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">10:30–12:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Founding Workshop — Peritoneal Summit Consortium / Society</span><br><span class="note">Funding models, governance, partnerships</span></div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">12:30–13:45</div><div class="event">Lunch <span class="note">(rolling arrivals)</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">13:45–14:00</div><div class="event">Welcome</div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">14:00–16:00</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 1 · Immune Homeostasis &amp; Surveillance</span><br><span class="speakers">Allen, Randolph</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">16:00–16:30</div><div class="event">Coffee</div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">16:30–18:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 2 · Thromboinflammation</span><br><span class="speakers">Kubes, Deniset</span></div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">19:00</div><div class="event">Standing dinner &amp; poster session</div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">20:30</div><div class="event">Fireside Chats <span class="note">(parallel)</span><ul class="sub"><li>"Is the mouse the right model?"</li><li>"What peritoneal implants do we need?"</li></ul></div></div>
:::

## Day 2 — 9 September 2027

::: {.schedule}
<div class="slot"><div class="time">08:30–10:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 3 · Mesothelium, MMT &amp; Fibrosis</span><br><span class="speakers">Herrick, Zhou</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">10:30–11:00</div><div class="event">Coffee</div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">11:00–12:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 4 · Peritoneal Niche &amp; Metabolism</span><br><span class="speakers">Naora, Weidinger</span></div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">12:30–15:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Long lunch + Hikes &amp; Trips</span><br><span class="note">Optional small-group discussions; hike, Thunersee boat, or cable-car options so everyone can join one</span><ul class="sub"><li>"Origin of cavity macrophages — does it matter?"</li><li>"Biobanking from humans — how can we maximize the benefit?"</li><li>"Theranostics — can we target the peritoneal space specifically?"</li><li>"Implant failure — is it due to scarring?"</li></ul></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">15:30–16:00</div><div class="event">Coffee &amp; buffer <span class="note">(return from trips)</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">16:00–18:00</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 5 · Pain</span><br><span class="speakers">Greaves + keynote TBD</span></div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">19:30</div><div class="event">Gala dinner <span class="note">(seated)</span></div></div>
:::

## Day 3 — 10 September 2027

::: {.schedule}
<div class="slot"><div class="time">08:30–10:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 6 · Particles, Biomaterials &amp; Foreign-Body Response</span><br><span class="speakers">Herrmann, Carmichael</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">10:30–11:00</div><div class="event">Coffee</div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">11:00–13:00</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Session 7 · Peritoneal Dialysis — EuroPD Session</span><br><span class="speakers">EuroPD nominees</span></div></div>
<div class="slot"><div class="time">13:00–13:30</div><div class="event"><span class="session-title">Awards &amp; Outlook</span><br><span class="note">Consortium report-back, poster/abstract prizes, concluding remarks</span></div></div>
<div class="slot feature"><div class="time">13:30</div><div class="event">Grab-and-go lunch → departures</div></div>
:::
